title: Slow Death of IT Sector Jobs: How AI Layoffs Are Reshaping India’s Tech Workforce and Middle Class Dreams
description: The IT sector has long been the engine of India’s middle-class aspiration and white-collar employment. As AI eats into jobs in the sector, India faces a massive socio-economic challenge

title: UK orders Google to improve AI search attribution, give publishers opt-out controls
description: It comes at a time when news websites and publishers globally see a sharp drop in traffic as users turn to AI-powered search features to look up information online.

title: Goldman lifts MSCI EM target on AI boost, flags Iran deal relief for forex, bonds
Amazon Layoffs Spark Employee Backlash as Company Accelerates AI Expansion
description: Amazon employees are challenging the company’s rapid AI data centre expansion as thousands lose jobs amid aggressive automation investments.

title: Gravitee launches Gamma as UK AI agents top 713,130
description: British firms now use 713,130 AI agents, sharpening pressure for tighter oversight as Gravitee rolls out Gamma to govern them.
